description: Local MCP tool manifest for the Edge fisheries gateway. Each tool is a DETERMINISTIC R function (see gatekeeper/R/mcp_tools.R) that the Agent Deployment Framework (ADF) orchestrator hands to the local LLM. The LLM proposes which tool to call and with what arguments; it never computes catch weights, codes, or zones itself. Nothing leaves the local machine.

tools.name: read_local_file_sample
tools.description: Reads the headers and first N rows of an uploaded file on local disk.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the uploaded file.

tools.name: infer_content_type
tools.description: Infers the data category (Longline logsheet, Purse seine logsheet, Size composition, Observer/bycatch, EM longline) from column structure.

tools.name: resolve_fao_species_code
tools.description: Resolves local/vernacular/typo species names to official 3-character FAO codes via the local taxonomic dictionary.

tools.name: resolve_port_code
tools.description: Maps free-text port names (e.g. 'Pohnpei Port', 'Kolonia') to the 5-letter UNLOCODE standard (FMPNI).

tools.name: validate_spatial_eez
tools.description: Resolves a coordinate to the EEZ / high-seas pocket it falls in and whether it is on land. (Bounding-box default; swap for R 'sf' polygon intersection in production.)

tools.name: query_local_vessel_registry
tools.description: Pulls structural metadata (flag, gear, hold capacity, max speed) for a vessel id / call sign from the offline TUFMAN 2 vessel cache.

tools.name: check_iuu_status
tools.description: Matches vessel identifiers (id / call sign / IMO / name) against the offline WCPFC IUU vessel list. A hit blocks ingestion.

tools.name: lookup_vessel_charter_status
tools.description: Checks if a vessel was under an active charter on a date; attributes catch to the chartering state vs the flag state.

tools.name: harvest_strategy_check
tools.description: Catch composition + mixed-fishery / 20% LRP advisory aligned with WCPFC harvest strategies.

tools.name: execute_r_validation
tools.description: Runs the full three-tier validation engine on a standardised table and returns the findings + a forward/hold decision.

tools.name: generate_annual_report_part1
tools.description: Compiles validated catch/effort into the WCPFC Annual Report Part 1 summary tables (Markdown).
